questions.question: What is the main objective of the E-Waste (Management) Amendment Rules, 2023, 2024, as per Textbook 1 (CH-6) and Textbook 2 (CH-2)?
questions.hint: The main objective of the E-Waste (Management) Amendment Rules, 2023, 2024 is to regulate the management of electronic waste and reduce its environmental impact.

questions.question: According to e-resource 3, what percentage of municipal solid waste in India is estimated to be e-waste?
questions.hint: The percentage of municipal solid waste in India that is estimated to be e-waste is not specified in e-resource 3.

questions.question: What are the key components of the E-Waste (Management) Amendment Rules, 2023, 2024, as discussed in Textbook 1 (CH-6) and Textbook 2 (CH-2)?
questions.hint: The key components of the E-Waste (Management) Amendment Rules, 2023, 2024 include producer responsibility, e-waste segregation, and proper disposal or recycling.
